title: Notice - Release of the final guidance document: “Switching from prescription to non-prescription status” - Canada.ca
content:
## Notice - Release of the final guidance document: “Switching from prescription to non-prescription status”
August 14, 2024 Our file number:  24-106412-576
Health  Canada is pleased to announce the release of the final version of the guidance document: “Switching from prescription to  non-prescription status” .
This  document replaces the guidance document “Data requirements for switching  medicinal ingredients from prescription to non-prescription status” and comes  into effect 60 days after its posting.
This new  version of the guidance document
- outlines       a new process for prescription to natural health product switches;
- provides       more in-depth guidance on data requirements for switches; and
- introduces       a new template to be included in all switch submissions.
Health  Canada thanks all those who provided comments on the draft revised guidance  document during the external consultation held from April 21 to June 20, 2022.  Health Canada’s multi-directorate working group finalized the guidance document  taking into consideration the feedback received from the consultation.
Questions  or concerns about this guidance document should be directed to:
Bureau of Policy, Science  and International Programs Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate Health Canada 1600 Scott Street Holland Cross, Tower B 6th Floor, Address Locator 3102C Ottawa ON  K1A 0K9 E-mail: policy_bureau_enquiries@hc-sc.gc.ca
